memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:16:25.snippet: - Menu bar icon: white SF Symbol "message" outline (Flutter scaling limitation, slight blur, acceptable) ## Debugging Notes (Apr 19 evening session) - BlueBubbles launch agent causes dock flash loop — app starts then exits because headless=0 by default - Setting headless=1 in config.db helps but Private API dylib injection into Messages.app crashes repeatedly on this VM - Root cause of dylib crashes: macOS Sequoia 15.7.5 + VM environment rejects dylib injection even with SIP off - **Working solution:** Login Item (not launch agent) + webhook with ?guid= auth param - After any reboot, check webhook is still registered: `curl -s "http://localhost:1234/api/v1/webhook?password=M1r4154w350m3!" |
